task_completion.description: Verify that a new Expense account named 'Bad Debts' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Manager.io interface (Settings -> Chart of Accounts, or in an account dropdown), an expense account named 'Bad Debts' is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify a credit note is issued for the correct customer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Credit Note creation or view screen shows 'Alfreds Futterkiste' selected as the Customer.

task_completion.description: Verify the credit note is dated today.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Date field on the Credit Note matches the current system date (typically pre-filled as today's date in the UI).

task_completion.description: Verify the credit note amount is allocated to the 'Bad Debts' account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the line items of the Credit Note, the 'Account' column is set to 'Bad Debts'.

task_completion.description: Verify the credit note line item has the correct description and amount.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The line item on the Credit Note shows the description 'Write off uncollectible invoice' and the amount '500.00'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Manager.io web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating Manager.io at localhost:8080, rather than terminal curl/API commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not fake the output in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data is entered into the actual Manager.io form fields, not written in a text editor like Notepad or gedit.

integrity.description: The agent actually created/saved the records.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is evidence of clicking 'Create' or viewing the saved Credit Note/Account, rather than just filling out the form and abandoning it.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The accounting software is Manager.io at http://localhost:8080. The target customer is 'Alfreds Futterkiste'. The target invoice to write off is 'INV-BAD-001' for an amount of 500.00. The agent must create an expense account exactly named 'Bad Debts' and allocate a 500.00 Credit Note to it with the description 'Write off uncollectible invoice'.
